steps.title: Rewrite both equations
steps.content:
Put the equations in standard form:
$$
16x-26y=8
$$
$$
-8x+ty=\frac{1}{5}
$$
For no solution, the lines must be parallel but distinct.

steps.title: Match the coefficients
steps.content:
The second equation's $x$-coefficient is $-\frac{1}{2}$ of the first equation's $x$-coefficient:
$$
-8=-\frac{1}{2}(16)
$$
Use the same factor on the $y$-coefficient:
$$
t=-\frac{1}{2}(-26)=13
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: With this value, the coefficients are proportional, but the constants are not because $\frac{1}{5}\ne -\frac{1}{2}(8)$. The lines are parallel and distinct, so the system has no solution. The answer is 13.
